summary: SINGLE_FOCUS NumberLine with BLUE ±√2 dots and GREEN ±√3 dots labeled via MathTex. Bottom split panel: LEFT GREEN 'Allowed' lists {e, σ: √2↔-√2, τ: √3↔-√3, στ} — the Klein four-group; RIGHT RED 'Forbidden' shows √2↔√3 with reason (√2)²=2≠3. Bottom conclusion Gal(Q(√2,√3)/Q) ≅ Z_2 × Z_2 = V_4 in YELLOW SurroundingRectangle.
